appDescription.message: Scoreon helps you capture visible sheet-music or tablature frames from educational videos and export them into clean PDF or OMR-ready image packages for personal study.

popupDescription.message: Capture visible sheet-music or tablature frames from a video, clean them up, and export a study PDF or OMR-ready package.

scannerTagline.message: Capture -> crop -> filter -> PDF / PNG ZIP / OMR Package

emptyHintHtml.message: Click Start capture and choose the tab or window that contains the video.

sourceTitleHintNone.message: No tab title has been read yet.

scoreDetectorOnly.message: Keep only frames that look like sheet music or tablature

autoTrim.message: Auto-trim white space and black bars

savedSnippetsHint.message: Delete anything you do not want before exporting.

sourceTitleMissing.message: No tab title was read. Type a title manually.

sourceTitleUnavailable.message: No captured tab title is available. Type a title manually.

sourceTitleApplied.message: Using the captured tab title for the PDF.

statusSelectScoreArea.message: Select the score area on the preview first.

tipFrameInterval.message: How often the video is checked for a new frame. Lower values catch more changes but use more CPU.

tipChangeThreshold.message: How different the current frame must be from the previous one before it counts as a new change. Lower it if small score movements are missed.

tipDuplicateThreshold.message: How strictly frames similar to saved ones are rejected. Higher values remove more duplicates, lower values keep more variations.

tipMinGap.message: Minimum time that must pass before another frame can be saved. Helps avoid clusters of nearly identical captures.

tipMaxImageWidth.message: Maximum width used when saving the frame for export. Higher values preserve more detail and help OMR, but increase file size and memory use.

tipScoreDetectorOnly.message: Keeps only frames that look enough like sheet music or tablature. Disable it if you want to capture everything manually.

tipMinScoreConfidence.message: Minimum detector score a frame needs to pass. Lower it if valid score frames are rejected, raise it if unrelated video content gets through.

tipEnhanceImage.message: Converts the saved frame to grayscale and boosts contrast. Usually helps PDF and OMR readability, but can emphasize noise in some videos.

tipAutoTrim.message: Removes extra white space and common black bars around the score. Makes exports tighter and easier to read.

tipTrimPadding.message: Extra space left around the score after trimming. Increase it if the crop feels too tight.

tipPdfOrientation.message: Choose portrait or landscape A4 output. Landscape usually fits wider scores better.

tipPdfMode.message: Choose whether the PDF packs multiple snippets per page or puts one frame on each page.

tipManualCapture.message: Saves the current cropped frame immediately, even if the automatic detector would reject it. Useful for difficult or borderline score frames.

frameLabelInput.message: Snippet label in the PDF, optional

omrReadmeOriginal.message: - original/: clean PNG exports for visual checking

omrReadmeProject.message: - project.json: metadata, labels and recommended workflow

omrReadmeStep1.message: 1. Open the images from the omr/ folder in Audiveris.

omrReadmeStep3.message: 3. Open the MusicXML/MXL file in MuseScore Studio.

omrReadmeStep5.message: 5. Save the final editable score as MSCZ.

omrReadmeWarning.message: OMR is not guaranteed to be perfect, especially with screenshots, tablature, low-resolution video, shadows, overlays or custom notation.

statusPngZipFailed.message: PNG ZIP export failed. Check the console.

statusOmrPackageFailed.message: OMR Package export failed. Check the console.

statusPdfFailed.message: PDF export failed. Check the console.
